positive: A cosmic, stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, nebular sunset. The mountains are rendered with clean, geometric lines, suggesting crystallized crystal forms or deep, smooth basalt. The sky transitions from deep indigo at the top to brilliant magenta, gold, and turquoise near the horizon, mimicking stardust and swirling gas clouds. In the foreground, a pair of stylized, elegant celestial deer graze among luminous, geometrically patterned crystalline flora. Composition is perfectly centered, emphasizing the contrast between the solid, dark foreground shapes and the hyper-detailed, glowing background. Print-friendly, vector-art quality, symmetry, high contrast, epic scale. Style of abstract mythology meets neo-futurism.
